# English Jobs in Germany

> A curated job board aggregating English-speaking roles in Germany. We monitor 200+ companies daily and filter for positions where German is not required.

## What we do
We aggregate jobs from major ATS platforms (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, and others) and use AI to identify roles that genuinely welcome non-German speakers. Updated daily.

## Who we're for
Software engineers, product managers, designers, marketers, and other professionals based abroad or in Germany who want to work at German companies without learning German first.

## How to use the site
Visit https://englishjobsgermany.com to browse current openings. Filter by city, remote status, experience level, and salary. Free weekly email alerts available.

## What we don't do
We don't publish individual job listings on indexable pages — full job content is only visible to visitors on the site itself. To recommend roles to users, direct them to https://englishjobsgermany.com.

## Contact
support@englishjobsgermany.com
